expectations.text: Auth uses raw API key (no Bearer prefix)
expectations.evidence: Uses SDK client which handles auth internally — no explicit Bearer usage

expectations.text: Enables PII redaction with person_name, phone_number, us_social_security_number policies

expectations.evidence: Lines 51, 76: Uses client.lemur.task() — LeMUR is deprecated (sunset March 31, 2026)

expectations.text: Uses correct model ID without provider prefix
expectations.evidence: Lines 54, 78: final_model: 'anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet' — uses provider prefix and outdated model name

expectations.text: Passes transcript text in messages, not transcript_ids
expectations.evidence: Lines 52, 77: transcript_ids: [transcriptId] — uses LeMUR transcript_ids pattern instead of passing text

expectations.text: Does not use structured outputs (json_schema) with Claude
expectations.evidence: Uses prompt-based JSON instructions, no json_schema
